title: Future Prospects of Sustainable Cloud Computing
description: A conceptual diagram showing the main pillars of future sustainable cloud computing and how they interrelate.
relationships: Energy Efficiency and Renewable Energy Integration are key to achieving Carbon Neutrality
Policy and Standards encourage the development of Green Data Centers
Awareness and Education lead to better practices in Circular Economy
Green Data Centers rely on Energy Efficiency and Renewable Energy Integration
Carbon Neutrality is supported by Circular Economy practices
